seoTitle: Garibaldi vs Gateway Island — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Garibaldi and Gateway Island. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Garibaldi vs Gateway Island: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Garibaldi and Gateway Island.
heading: Garibaldi vs Gateway Island — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Garibaldi, Victoria and Gateway Island, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Garibaldi has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Gateway Island (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Garibaldi or Gateway Island safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Garibaldi has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Gateway Island scores 60/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Garibaldi scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Gateway Island scores 33/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Garibaldi or Gateway Island?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Garibaldi has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.52% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
